description: Execute V0.7-M6-A by generating an evidence-based assessment report of the Personal Mode pilot.
scope: Generate a pilot report document (tasks/v0.7-m6-a-personal-pilot-report.md) demonstrating how the artifact taxonomy and lifecycle operate seamlessly under a single-developer AI Coding environment (e.g., Cursor) without unmanageable friction.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO .agent-state/ physical migrations. NO modifications to the MCP server. NO new review automation code. NO expansion to formal rollouts. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to build functional subagent review hooks.
Executing without an approved M6-A contract.
